deploy.title: Project Deploy
deploy.subtitle: Manage and deploy source code projects
deploy.no_projects: No projects yet. Create one to deploy your first app.
deploy.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this project? All build data will be removed.
deploy.deploy_key_hint: Required for private repositories using SSH
deploy.deploy_key_encrypted: Deploy keys are encrypted at rest for security.
deploy.github_app_hint: GitHub App authentication provides fine-grained access control. You need to create a GitHub App and install it on your repository.
deploy.github_private_key_hint: The RSA private key generated for your GitHub App. Will be encrypted at rest.
deploy.domain_hint: Optional. A reverse proxy will be created automatically.
deploy.name_url_required: Project name and Git URL are required
deploy.env_rebuild_hint: Changes take effect on the next build
deploy.import_env_hint: Copy environment variables from another project
deploy.webhook_hint: Add this URL to your Git repository's webhook settings to trigger auto-deploy on push.
deploy.mode_bare_hint: Build and run directly on the host using systemd.
deploy.mode_docker_hint: Build Docker image and run as a container.
deploy.docker_needs_dockerfile: Docker mode requires a Dockerfile in the project root.
deploy.docker_port_hint: The port your app listens on inside the container. Leave 0 to auto-assign.
deploy.ai_diagnosing: AI is analyzing the build failure...
deploy.resource_limits_hint: 0 = unlimited. CPU 100% = 1 core. Build timeout default is 30 minutes.
deploy.no_diagnosis: No AI diagnosis available for this build failure
deploy.github_oauth_hint: Connect your GitHub account to select repositories directly. Credentials are managed via your GitHub App.
deploy.github_oauth_not_configured: GitHub App is not configured yet. Please fill in the configuration below to get started.
deploy.github_oauth_setup_steps:
1. Go to GitHub Settings → Developer settings → GitHub Apps → New GitHub App
2. Set the callback URL to: {your_panel_url}/api/plugins/deploy/github/callback
3. Enable Repository permissions (Contents: Read-only)
4. After creating, note the App ID, Client ID, generate a Client Secret and Private Key
deploy.github_oauth_app_slug_hint: The URL-friendly name of your GitHub App (from the App URL).

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.preset_hint: Click a provider to auto-fill configuration. You can also configure manually below.
ai.api_format_hint: Choose the API format matching your provider. Most OpenAI-compatible providers use 'OpenAI Chat Completions'.
ai.base_url_hint: API endpoint URL for your chosen provider
ai.api_key_hint: Your API key will be encrypted and stored securely
ai.model_hint: Select from presets or enter a custom model name
ai.embedding_intro_desc:
Embedding models convert text into vectors, enabling semantic search — understanding meaning rather than just matching keywords. When enabled, the AI assistant can more accurately recall conversation history and panel operations.

Note: Embedding models require an OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoint. Providers like Anthropic and Google that only offer chat APIs do not provide embeddings — you'll need a separate provider.
ai.embedding_free_list:
- Jina AI — 1M free tokens/month (jina-embeddings-v3)
- Cohere — Free Trial API Key (embed-multilingual-v3.0)
- Google Gemini — Free (text-embedding-004, requires OpenAI-compatible gateway)
- SiliconFlow — Free quota (BAAI/bge-m3)
- Cloudflare Workers AI — 10k free requests/day (@cf/baai/bge-base-en-v1.5)
ai.embedding_model_hint: Leave empty to disable semantic search (falls back to keyword search). Only OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoints are supported.
ai.embedding_api_override_hint: Embeddings often require a different API provider than your chat model. Leave empty to use chat API credentials (only works if your chat provider also offers embeddings, e.g. OpenAI).
ai.embedding_base_url_placeholder: e.g. https://api.openai.com (leave empty to use chat API)
ai.embedding_api_key_placeholder: Leave empty to use chat API key
ai.connection_ok: Connection successful! AI is ready to use.
ai.embedding_connection_ok: Embedding connection successful! Vector search is ready.
ai.not_configured: AI assistant is not configured yet. Set up your API key to get started.
ai.start_hint: Type a message below to start chatting
ai.error_response: Failed to get response. Please check your AI configuration.
ai.empty_response: No response received from the AI. This may be caused by the provider not supporting tool use. Please check the AI configuration or try a different model.
ai.compose_placeholder: Describe your application (e.g. 'WordPress with MySQL and Redis')
ai.memories_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all AI memories? This cannot be undone.
ai.confirm_description: The AI wants to execute the following action. Do you approve?
ai.risk_description:
The AI assistant can directly operate your server, including creating websites, managing databases, executing commands, and more. Please note:

1. AI operations may cause service interruptions or data loss
2. Please back up important data before using
3. Sensitive operations will require your confirmation
4. It is recommended to test in a staging environment first

By continuing, you acknowledge and accept the above risks.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Manage installed plugins. Enable or disable plugins to extend panel functionality. Changes take effect after restart.
plugins.page_description: Install, uninstall, and manage plugins to extend Web.Casa functionality.
plugins.empty: No plugins installed yet. Plugins extend Web.Casa with Docker management, project deployment, AI assistant, and more.
plugins.restart_required: Restart required for changes to take effect

descriptions.deploy: Source code deployment for Node.js, Go, PHP, Python projects with auto-detection and process management
descriptions.docker: Docker & Docker Compose management with simple and advanced modes
descriptions.database: Create and manage MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Redis instances via Docker
descriptions.php: Manage PHP-FPM and FrankenPHP runtimes, create PHP websites with one click
descriptions.ai: AI-powered chat assistant with error diagnosis and template generation
descriptions.filemanager: File browser, online editor, and web terminal
descriptions.firewall: Manage firewalld rules via web UI
descriptions.cronjob: General-purpose scheduled task management with shell command execution
descriptions.monitoring: Real-time system metrics, historical charts, and threshold alerts
descriptions.backup: Backup and restore panel data, Docker volumes, and databases via Kopia
descriptions.appstore: One-click Docker app installation and project template marketplace
descriptions.mcpserver: Model Context Protocol server for AI IDE integration (Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code)
